subcodes.first_line: O Taraz! The Wronged One maketh mention of thee from the precincts of the Prison with verses that have enraptured the hearts of the Concourse on High [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا طراز یذکرک المظلوم من شطر السجن بایات انجذبت بها افئده الملا الاعلی و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @the concourse on high, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
